items.h: Young Bucks Comment On Mick Foley Joining AEW
items.p: The Young Bucks are happy to see Mick Foley in AEW. Foley debuted for the company at the Double Or Nothing pay-per-view, where he hosted the pre-show and had an in-ring confrontation with MJF....

items.h: AEW's Jim Ross Doesn't Believe WWE Shareholder Lawsuit Will Be 'Over Quickly'
items.p: The WWE Shareholders lawsuit against Vince McMahon is set to begin next week.

items.h: AEW World Champion MJF Pulled From Indie Booking Due To Injury
items.p: MJF's match at Beyond Wrestling's Break The Walls Down has officially been cancelled after he suffered a knee injury on "AEW Dynamite."
